feedback.text: Please consider adding a sixth point about retaining digital goods after purchase. This video by Ross Scott (https://youtu.be/E6vO4RIcBtE?si=Rfm_CS_Ukfn4FWkj&t=360) suggests the following: 6. Publishers permanently disabling video games they have already sold. Some publishers are selling video games under terms that may already violate Directive 93/13/EEC and deliberately prevent customers from retaining or repairing their purchase. I would wish to generalise to all digital goods, which includes video games.
